_comment: Register-explicit ABI validation. ORIGINAL SEED_GetRandomNumber (PD2 0x510b0 = 4272) uses a CUSTOM convention: pSeed in ECX, max in EAX -> orig_regs. The reimpl is a normal __fastcall(pSeed, max) called via the standard marshaller (pSeed->ECX, max->EDX). Both advance the 8-byte seed in place; compare the u32 return AND the mutated seed. Covers: max<1 (early 0), max=pow2 (& branch), max non-pow2 (% branch).
name: SEED_GetRandomNumber
